MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ACKERMAN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Michael Ackerman's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Mr. Ackerman is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
